---
title: "The thread without letters"
date: 2011-05-13
forum: Cafe Games
---

### Post by PCaddicted on 2011-05-13
In this thread you can post anything but you mustn't write letters(the letters of the standard alphabet,you know,from A,a to Z,z).You can build letters using other characters.I mean,you can use leet(1337),ASCII or whatever,but you mustn't post any of the letters of the standard alphabet(A,a-Z,z).
Post #1 and the title of this thread are exceptions,because I had to tell you the rules and I couldn't do it without using letters.
The rules mentioned above will apply starting with post #2.

---

```
.. ...  - .... .. ...  --- -.- ..--..
```
